## What does this change?

## Checklist

- [ ] I edited `data/startups.json` (not `README.md` or `data/startups.csv` by hand).
- [ ] I ran `python3 scripts/generate.py` and committed the regenerated `README.md` and `data/startups.csv`.
- [ ] Each new or changed entry has a verifiable source (company site or article).
- [ ] Descriptions are factual and neutral, and the category is one of the eight allowed values.
